# JustSupport Charity Website (Python Flask App with Frontend) # This includes a basic chatbot and uses Bootstrap for styling. # Ensure required packages: flask, flask-cors from flask import Flask, render_template, request, jsonify from flask_cors import CORS app = Flask(__name__) CORS(app) # Sample chatbot response logic def get_bot_response(user_input): user_input = user_input.lower() if "help" in user_input: return "We're here to support the elderly and disabled. How can we assist you today?" elif "services" in user_input: return "We offer companionship, home visits, transport support, and more." elif "donate" in user_input: return "Thank you for your interest! Visit our Donate page to support our cause." else: return "Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly." @app.route("/") def home(): return render_template("index.html") @app.route("/chat", methods=["POST"]) def chat(): user_input = request.json.get("message") response = get_bot_response(user_input) return jsonify({"response": response}) if __name__ == "__main__": app.run(debug=True) # ------------------------------ # Create a folder named 'templates' and place the following HTML inside 'index.html': # # # # # # JustSupport | Supporting the Vulnerable # # # # #
#
#

Welcome to JustSupport

#

Compassionate care for the elderly and disabled in the UK

#
#
#
# #
#
#

Chat with Us

#
# # #
#
#
# # #
